roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, Marzban credential isolation, inbound tag resolution, ownership ledger and update controller
roles.edge: central web dashboard plus reseller bots and shared Marzban service lifecycle
roles.processor: scheduled shared Marzban usage polling, automatic debits, health, backups and background automation

features: shared Marzban remains the service backend without overwriting the PasarGuard management agency id, username or remote manager id
reseller management login accepts the correct PasarGuard account while shared Marzban is enabled
bot license type changes continue to update the PasarGuard manager role in shared Marzban mode
legacy agencies with a missing remote_manager_id can be recovered from the Telegram-linked PasarGuard administrator
PasarGuard profile wrappers are normalized before identity comparison
the final type-change confirmation keyboard is removed immediately to reduce duplicate submissions
all shared Marzban ownership and per-reseller usage billing features remain included

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot
deployment.marzban_url_input: accepts https://host or https://host/dashboard and stores normalized API base
deployment.manager_dashboard: normalized API base + /dashboard/; visible only in central management interfaces
deployment.template_input: exact username of an existing Marzban account whose proxies/inbounds should be used as the service template
deployment.management_identity: PasarGuard agency fields remain attached to each direct reseller bot even when Marzban is the active service backend

validation.worker_node_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.shared_marzban_identity_preservation: passed in core, edge and processor; PasarGuard agency fields remained intact
validation.reseller_login_identity_checks: passed for valid direct login and legacy null-identity recovery
validation.remote_manager_recovery: passed for exact username match and same-owner duplicate relink
validation.live_pasarguard_login: not run because production credentials were not provided
validation.embedded_browser_scripts: 10 script blocks extracted and passed node --check

limitations: automatic remote manager recovery requires the PasarGuard manager Telegram ID to match the reseller owner or an exact stored panel username match
live validation requires production PasarGuard credentials and network access
